headline_seed: Trump-backed populist wins tight Colombia presidential vote, sparking protests - CBS News
draft_text:
Right-wing lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella narrowly won Colombia's presidential runoff Sunday, holding ~49.7% to Iván Cepeda's ~48.7% with 99% counted, per CBS News and BBC News. Cepeda has not conceded.

And that's the mews.
